rationale: The skill instructs the agent to detect installed AI SDKs by grepping package.json/requirements.txt/pyproject.toml, then write Sentry init code into JS/TS/Python config files (e.g., sentry.edge.config.ts). It may install Sentry SDK packages via npm or pip, which contacts npmjs.org/pypi.org. The skill explicitly tells the agent to verify against docs.sentry.io. No deletions are implied — only configuration additions.
